questionHtml: Using an externalities diagram, explain how the Chinese infrastructure projects have caused negative externalities (paragraph [6]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The y axis may be labelled price but could be costs or benefits and the x axis labelled quantity.
